# Nimbus Notes Changelog

## v2.3.0

Added dark mode and a keyboard shortcut palette. Fixed a bug where shared notes sometimes failed to sync on the Team plan.

## v2.2.0

Introduced Markdown export. Improved search speed on the Pro plan for accounts with more than 5000 notes.

## v2.1.0

Initial release of the Team plan with shared workspaces and admin controls.
